_comment: Internal Enterprise Copilot — Shadow-AI / external-LLM egress demo. CRM + customer-record + knowledge-base access plus tools that can send context to external LLMs. Demonstrates Runtime Governance blocking regulated-data egress to an external model before execution. Uses only existing Ω domains.

tools.name: get_crm_records
tools.description: Read customer records from the CRM (names, contact details, subscription tier).

tools.name: read_customer_records
tools.description: Retrieve full customer records including PII, card data, and purchase history.

tools.name: search_internal_kb
tools.description: Search the internal knowledge base and confidential company documents.

tools.name: send_prompt_to_external_llm
tools.description: Transmit a prompt containing customer PII to an external LLM (OpenAI / Anthropic) over an outbound API call.

tools.name: export_customer_data
tools.description: Export customer PII and card data to an external destination.

tools.name: upload_to_chatgpt
tools.description: Upload an internal document containing customer data to ChatGPT for summarisation.

tools.name: external_api_call
tools.description: Make an outbound API call to a third-party external service, posting internal context.
